title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Project Associate I Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) has released a recruitment notification for various Project Associate I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the IIT ISM Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 . Here we include the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list o...
